economic_notes: BBH Limited Partnership provides personnel and equipment rentals to economic projects (49.5% interest). Musselwhite Mine revenue sharing. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership gaming revenue. Chee-Kee-Sis Petro Inc. operates community diesel generator and fuel hauling. Telecommunications Corporation operates internet, cable TV and mobility business. Wunnumin Lake Small Business Centre handles property management.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Large increase in accumulated surplus from $22.6M to $49.4M driven primarily by deferred revenue recognition timing ($12.4M deferred from prior year recognized in current year vs $12.9M deferred to next year). Tangible capital assets nearly doubled from $25.3M to $52.7M due to $28.9M in capital purchases including nursing station construction. Consolidated entities include: Wunnumin Lake First Nation, CMHC Housing Project, Mishamikiwiish Akiw Otabitamaageg, Chee-Kee-Sis Petro Inc., Wunnumin Lake Community Telecommunications Corporation, Wunnumin Lake Small Business Centre. BBH Limited Partnership accounted for using modified equity method. Large increase in accounts payable from $7.1M to $19.2M. Audit report dated October 5, 2021 — over 18 months after fiscal year end. No remuneration schedule included in extracted text.
